case_title: SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. VS. MAVERICK TECHNOLOGIES INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-30-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). ***NOTE: ONLY A DEFAULT WAS ENTERED. A SEPARATE JUDGMENT NEEDS TO BE SUBMITTED.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT MAVERICK TECHNOLOGIES INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAVERICK TECHNOLOGIES INC. $17,342.25 PRINCIPAL, $482.65 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,824.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65986611)

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT MAVERICK TECHNOLOGIES INC. DOES 1 TO 25 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-30-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-27-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-08-2020
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65722810), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO. SERVED JUN-22-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUN-23-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT MAVERICK TECHNOLOGIES INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $482.65 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 65829427) AS TO DEFENDANT MAVERICK TECHNOLOGIES INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65850087)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65986611) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION OF COREY M. POLLAK WAIVING ATTORNEY FEES PRAYER IN COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65989934) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEEDY DRAYAGE CO.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-30-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
